revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Talkquote]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Talkquote]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: fix double redirect to final target
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:en:Template:Talk quote block]]

{{#if: {{{style|}}} | style={{{style}}} }}>{{{text|{{{1|{{str trim|{{lorem ipsum}}}}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{by|y{{{2|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} |
— {{#if: {{{noping|}}}{{{no-ping|}}} | User:{{{by|{{#invoke:String|match|{{{id}}}|c%-(..-)-%d}}}}} | [[User:{{{by|{{{2|{{#invoke:String|match|{{{id}}}|c%-(..-)-%d|nomatch=Example User}}}}}}}}]] }} }}{{#if: {{{source|}}} |
{{#if: {{{nodash|}}}{{{no-dash|}}} || —  }}{{{source}}} }}{{#if: {{{ts|y{{{id|}}}}}} | {{#if: {{{id|y}}} | [[Special:GoToComment/{{{id|c-Example_User-20240604182100-Example}}}|{{{ts|{{#time: H:i, j F Y | {{#invoke:String|match|{{{id|c-Example_User-20240604182100-Example}}}|-([^-]+)%-|start=3}} }} (UTC)}}}]] | {{#if: {{{oldid|y}}} | [[Special:Diff/{{{oldid|{{REVISIONID}}}}}|{{{ts}}}]] | {{#if: {{{diff|}}} | [{{{diff}}} {{{ts}}}] | {{{ts}}} }} }} }}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{style|}}} | style={{{style}}} }}>{{{text|{{{1|{{str trim|{{lorem ipsum}}}}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{by|y{{{2|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} |

{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{style|}}} | style={{{style}}} }}>{{{text|{{{1|{{str trim|{{lorem ipsum}}}}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{by|y{{{2|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} |

{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{style|}}} | style={{{style}}} }}>{{{text|{{{1|{{str trim|{{lorem ipsum}}}}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{by|y{{{2|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} |

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
